High branches result in plenty of air circulating along the ground, while the trees' fine needles allow light to filter through the canopy, creating ideal conditions for the scrubby bushes to thrive along the forest floor.

node.name: Carleen's Emporium
node.description: Southwest, the cart track leaves the forest and enters an area of fields and farms. To the northeast, the road narrows as it enters the deep woods. Stands of young ironwood and oak vie for space among the tall shrubs and weeds that border the road. In the distant southwest, the terrain slowly flattens to a patchwork of fields and farms.

Stuffed with knick-knacks and kitsch treasures, this little shop is the perfect place to stop for a travel break. Wooden shelves hold a variety of items suitable for mementos or gifts, and the back wall is devoted to a counter holding refreshments. A note with a platinum kronar encased inside its glass frame hangs on the wall behind the attendant.

node.name: Ilaya Taipa Chapel, Antechamber
node.description: Scattered along the polished grey floor, nubby silk cushions provide a place for worshippers to rest and chat with each other. A low table in the center of the antechamber holds a small brazier filled with resinous woods that perfumes the air as it warms the room, the smoke rising in lazy circles to escape through vents in the thatched roof. Wavering light reflects up a blue-green stairway from the sanctum below.

node.name: Ilaya Taipa Chapel, Library
node.description: Heavy oil lamps hang over each of the tables in the library, each suspended by three sturdy chains from hooks in the ceiling joists. The arrangement of chains allows the lamps to sway freely as the building's bamboo supports flex before wind and wave, keeping the light steady yet reducing the chance of fire from an overturned candle. Glass-fronted bookcases keep the chapel's precious books and scrolls safely tucked away until needed by a scholar.

node.name: Ilaya Taipa Chapel, Schoolroom
node.description: Rows of tables face a dais at the far side of the small room, each with a pair of low seats beneath it. Here, the village priest doubles as a teacher to the young, instructing them in their letters as well as their heritage.

node.name: Ilaya Taipa Chapel, Inner Sanctum
node.description: Blue-green stairs shimmer like ice as they curve around the outer perimeter of the room. Something, either magic or mechanical, causes water to flow continuously down the outside of the sanctum's glass walls, flooding the interior with wavering light. Concentric rows of benches angle down toward the central altar, a simple piece of polished grey driftwood decorated with scattered water lilies.

Blue-green stairs shimmer like ice as they curve around the outer perimeter of the room. Something, either magic or mechanical, causes water to flow continuously down the outside of the sanctum's glass walls, flooding the interior with wavering moonlight. Concentric rows of benches angle down toward the central altar, a simple piece of polished grey driftwood decorated with scattered water lilies.

node.name: Harbor Tower, Roof
node.description: High above the town walls, the roof of the tower commands a wide view. A slotted bronze brazier, cold during the daylight hours, is fastened to the stone floor and surrounded by tempered glass panes that blunt the force of the wind. At dusk, the brazier will be lit to guide ships on the river. Mounted along the tower's wall, a sturdy telescope points up to the heavens.

A bright fire burns in a slotted bronze brazier. From dusk until dawn, the fires burn atop this and the neighboring harbor tower to guide river traffic to safety. A sturdy telescope mounted along the tower's wall points up toward the heavens.

High above the town walls, the roof of the tower commands a wide view. A bright fire burns in a slotted bronze brazier, sheltered from the winds by tempered glass panels fastened to the stone floor. From dusk until dawn, the fires atop this and the neighboring harbor tower are carefully tended, guiding river traffic to safety. Evidently one of the guards is an amateur astronomer, for a sturdy telescope is mounted along the tower's wall.

node.name: Harbor Tower, Roof
node.description: A hexagonal array of tempered glass panes surrounds a wide bronze brazier, shielding the signal fire from the wind and rain when it is lit. Traffic along the river depends on the tower fires to navigate after dark. In the daytime, the braziers remain cool and the bronze and glass are polished by young guardsmen to remove the night's accumulation of soot.

node.name: Ilaya Taipa, Pier
node.description: Blandly anonymous, as all such places are, the weathered boards of the pier creak underfoot. Heavy pilings on either side are lashed together by layers of tarred rope.

node.name: Zuhaichaga Inn, Scarlet Nightshade Room
node.description: Narrow tendrils of smoke curl up from a brass brazier nestled beside the hearth, as burning incense gives rise to a heavy sandalwood fragrance that permeates the room. Black lacquer with gold leaf tracery decorates the pencil post bed and a thin black coverlet edged with bands of brightly colored abstract embroidery covers it. Beside the fire, a pair of rattan armchairs provide a comfortable place for guests to relax before going to sleep.
